content.text: How can I create a default, configurable GUI component with specific visual properties and basic movement controls?

This function acts as a trait initialiser by creating an instance of Container. It configures essential parameters like background color and automatically enables sizing before adding necessary tools.

```python
def _component_default(self):
        """ Trait initialiser.
        """
        component = Container(fit_window=False, auto_size=True,
            bgcolor="green")#, position=list(self.pos) )
        component.tools.append( MoveTool(component) )
#        component.tools.append( TraitsTool(component) )
        return component
```

The returned container is set up for automatic resizing with a green background, and it is guaranteed to have the MoveTool enabled for interaction.
If I wanted this component always visible in the center of the screen upon creation without needing manual adjustment, how would I modify the initialization?
You need to uncomment the position line when creating the container instance, like using `position=list(self.pos)` during setup.
That makes the positioning much clearer.
